provenance.task: PR 6 C2.1 — pre-apply PROD grade_levels census (read-only)
provenance.source: mcp__supabase-remote__execute_sql (PROD jxlxtzkmicfhchkhiojz), read-only SELECT lesson_id, grade_levels FROM public.lessons WHERE lesson_id IN (<753 staged ids>), two batches
provenance.purpose: The corpus snapshot (artifacts/corpus.jsonl) carries no current grade_levels. This file is the 'before' side of the grade-diff review artifact (pr6-retag-grade-diff.md). Values are the live PROD grade_levels arrays at capture time; a value of null means the lesson_id was not found in PROD at capture (should be empty given all 753 are live corpus rows).
